findings.title: Potential Privacy Risk Identified
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or consent mechanisms in the documentation.
assumptions: Privacy risks may arise from inadequate PII handling or consent mechanisms.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Review and enhance PII handling and consent mechanisms.

metadata.mitigation: Review and enhance PII handling and consent mechanisms.

findings.title: Critical Mobile Notification Delivery Issues
findings.description: Silent failures in push notifications for Android 14 users pose a critical risk to user engagement and satisfaction.
assumptions: Failure to deliver notifications will lead to user attrition.

evidence.excerpt: A significant portion of users on Android 14 are experiencing silent failures in push notifications.

recommendations: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for Android 14.

metadata.mitigation: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for Android 14.

findings.title: High Risk of Notification Delivery Latency
findings.description: The need to reduce notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms poses a high risk to performance and user experience.
assumptions: High latency will negatively impact user satisfaction.

evidence.excerpt: Reducing notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms is critical for performance.

recommendations: Optimize the delivery pipeline to reduce latency.

metadata.mitigation: Optimize the delivery pipeline to reduce latency.

findings.title: Accessibility Concerns in Notification Center
findings.description: Users with disabilities face challenges navigating the notification center due to color-only priority indicators, indicating a need for improved accessibility features.
assumptions: Inadequate accessibility features may lead to user exclusion.

evidence.excerpt: Users with disabilities face challenges navigating the notification center.

recommendations: Enhance accessibility features in the notification center.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance accessibility features in the notification center.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Documentation Gaps
findings.description: Lack of compliance documentation for notification features may lead to legal and accessibility standard violations.
assumptions: Inadequate compliance documentation can result in legal repercussions.

evidence.excerpt: Create compliance documentation for notification features.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 privacy, 2 security). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (2 blockers, 1 warnings).
